description: Circular by which the Internal Control Body of the Attorney General's Office communicates to the dependencies and entities of the Federal Public Administration, to the productive companies of the State, Autonomous Bodies, as well as to the entitiesfederal authorities, municipalities and mayors' offices of Mexico City, that the sanction imposed on the company GE de México, Sociedad Anónima de Capital Variable, consisting of temporary disqualification for a period of twelve months, to participate directly orby an interposed person in contracting procedures or enter into contracts regulated by the Law of Public Works and Related Services, determined in the resolution of October eighteenth, two thousand and twenty-three, issued in the procedure ofthe sanction to suppliers 0003/2023, published on November 9, two thousand and twenty-three, has been annulled.
